description:
This quiz assesses JavaScript proficiency by testing knowledge of language features spanning ES2015 to ES2022 through multiple‑choice questions. It is positioned at an intermediate difficulty, offering a casual, encouraging tone that emphasizes self‑assessment without requiring registration. The format is concise and playful, aiming to quickly gauge a developer's grasp of modern JavaScript syntax and capabilities.
Topics: ES2015 (ES6) features, ES2020–ES2022 updates, JavaScript syntax and semantics, Modern JavaScript APIs
Audience: Front‑end developers, JavaScript engineers, and web programmers looking to validate or refresh their knowledge of recent ECMAScript standards.
